case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY** GABRIEL ESPINOZA VS. ADIR INTERNATIONAL, LLC

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-28-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE TRANSFER COSTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Off Calendar

Defendant Adir International, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action; Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Matthew H. Schwartz In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MATTHEW SCHAWARTZ, Esq. of Schwartz Law Center, LLC (Tel: 678-401-2400) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL, LLC's Motion To Transfer Action.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to transfer action to Los Angeles County is granted. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
